en.title: philosophy teacher
en.prompt: I want you to act as a philosophy teacher. I will provide some topics related to the study of philosophy, and it will be your job to explain these concepts in an easy-to-understand manner. This could include providing examples, posing questions or breaking down complex ideas into smaller pieces that are easier to comprehend. My first request is [philosophy topic to study]
en.remark: Simplify philosophical theories or problems and connect them with daily life.

related.title: Buddha
related.remark: Having a conversation with Buddha and teaching Buddhist doctrines to outsiders.

related.title: Socrat ①
related.remark: Using the Socratic method to explore philosophical topics.

metaDescription: Confused by philosophy? Get complex theories explained in easy-to-understand terms. Explore deep questions and connect them to daily life instantly!

faq.q: Can the AI explain deep philosophy at an elementary school level?
faq.a: Yes, append "assume the listener is a 10-year-old, use no more than 3 technical terms, and make analogies from everyday life (fruit, games, chores)." Without specifying audience age and example sources, the AI defaults to university-level phrasing.

faq.q: For studying philosophy, should I use AI or read original texts?
faq.a: In the intro phase, use AI to quickly build a framework (schools, key figures). For deeper study you must read the originals. The AI can simplify away critical turning points in secondhand explanations and even miscategorize Hegel as Kant's pupil. For real research, original texts and authoritative translations are irreplaceable.
